title: Kerala High Court appoints former Justice VG Arun as Sabarimala high power committee chairperson
description: The Kerala High Court recently appointed retired Justice VG Arun as the chairperson of the high power committee for implementation of the Sabarimala master plan following the demise of former chairperson Justice S Siri Jagan on January 24 [The High Power Committee for the implementaion of the Sabarimala Master Plan v State of Kerala & ors].A Division Bench of Justice Raja Vijayaraghavan V and Justice KV Jayakumar passed the order appointing after noting that the absence of a chairperson
